languages.text: "Ибо молвил Бог-Машина на всепостижимом бинарике: "Искажение замысла моего есмь ересь". Перед ликом Омниссии я провозглашаю сий приговор богоугодным и вторю ему стократ".

"For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' Before the Omnissiah's gaze, I declare this verdict righteous, and I echo it a hundredfold."
languages.original_text: "Ибо молвил Бог-Машина на всепостижимом бинарике: "Искажение замысла моего есмь ересь". Перед ликом Омниссии я провозглашаю сий приговор богоугодным и вторю ему стократ".

traits.locale_text: "For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' Before the Omnissiah's gaze, I declare this verdict righteous, and I echo it a hundredfold."

"For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' Before the Omnissiah's gaze, I declare this verdict righteous, and I echo it a hundredfold."

languages.text: «Pues así habló el Dios Máquina en el binario, que todo lo comprende: "La distorsión de Mi diseño es herejía". Ante la mirada del Omnissiah, declaro este veredicto justo y me hago eco de él cien veces».
languages.original_text: "For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' Before the Omnissiah's gaze, I declare this verdict righteous, and I echo it a hundredfold."

traits.locale_text: «Pues así habló el Dios Máquina en el binario, que todo lo comprende: "La distorsión de Mi diseño es herejía". Ante la mirada del Omnissiah, declaro este veredicto justo y me hago eco de él cien veces».

languages.text: “因万机之神曾以那包罗万象的二进制圣言如此宣告：‘扭曲吾之设计，即为异端。’在欧姆尼赛亚的注视下，我宣布这一裁决完全正当，并将复诵百遍。”
languages.original_text: "For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' Before the Omnissiah's gaze, I declare this verdict righteous, and I echo it a hundredfold."

traits.locale_text: “因万机之神曾以那包罗万象的二进制圣言如此宣告：‘扭曲吾之设计，即为异端。’在欧姆尼赛亚的注视下，我宣布这一裁决完全正当，并将复诵百遍。”

languages.text: "Denn so sprach der Maschinengott in allumfassendem Binhärisch: 'Die Störung Meines Plans ist Ketzerei.' Vor den Augen des Omnissiah erkläre ich dieses Urteil als rechtmäßig und wiederhole es hundertfach."
languages.original_text: "For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' Before the Omnissiah's gaze, I declare this verdict righteous, and I echo it a hundredfold."

traits.locale_text: "Denn so sprach der Maschinengott in allumfassendem Binhärisch: 'Die Störung Meines Plans ist Ketzerei.' Vor den Augen des Omnissiah erkläre ich dieses Urteil als rechtmäßig und wiederhole es hundertfach."

languages.text: « Ainsi parla le Dieu-Machine dans la langue binhaire universelle : "Toute déformation de Mon dessein relève de l'hérésie." Sous le regard de l'Omnimessie, je déclare ce verdict juste et j'y souscris pleinement. »
languages.original_text: "For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' Before the Omnissiah's gaze, I declare this verdict righteous, and I echo it a hundredfold."

traits.locale_text: « Ainsi parla le Dieu-Machine dans la langue binhaire universelle : "Toute déformation de Mon dessein relève de l'hérésie." Sous le regard de l'Omnimessie, je déclare ce verdict juste et j'y souscris pleinement. »

languages.text: "Zira Makine Tanrı, her şeyi kavrayan ikilidilde şöyle buyurmuştur: 'Tasarımımın çarpıtılması kâfirliktir.' Hermesih'in bakışları altında bu kararın haklı olduğunu beyan ediyor ve bunu yüz katıyla yansıtıyorum."
languages.original_text: "For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' Before the Omnissiah's gaze, I declare this verdict righteous, and I echo it a hundredfold."

traits.locale_text: "Zira Makine Tanrı, her şeyi kavrayan ikilidilde şöyle buyurmuştur: 'Tasarımımın çarpıtılması kâfirliktir.' Hermesih'in bakışları altında bu kararın haklı olduğunu beyan ediyor ve bunu yüz katıyla yansıtıyorum."

languages.text: 機械神は全知全能の二進法でこう言った。「私の設計の歪みは異端である」オムニシアの視線のもと、私はこの判決を正義と宣言し、これを百倍に繰り返す。
languages.original_text: "For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' Before the Omnissiah's gaze, I declare this verdict righteous, and I echo it a hundredfold."

traits.locale_text: 機械神は全知全能の二進法でこう言った。「私の設計の歪みは異端である」オムニシアの視線のもと、私はこの判決を正義と宣言し、これを百倍に繰り返す。
